titleStmt.title: SII 18.114: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 114. (B.K. No. 185 of 1932-33.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying near the northern prākāra of the Vīranārāyaṇasvāmin temple.

summary.p: This inscription which refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 41, Durmukhi, Pushya ba. 3, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti corresponding regularly to A.D. 1116, December 24, Sunday.

It records a grant of land made for a feeding house (satra) and for the worship of god Maṇiyara-Mallikārjunadēva by Maṇiyara-Mahādēvayya-Nāyaka of the agrahāra town Baṭṭakeṟe. Baṭṭakeṟe and the Mahājanas of that place are highly praised. The genealogy of Mahādēvayya-Nāyaka is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . ©
© namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahī . khurāntaragatō yasya mēruḥ khaṇa kaṇāyatē ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā ©
śrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō ttarābhivṛddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire svasti © yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa mōnānuṣṭhānaparā
yaṇajapasamādhi śīlaguṇasaṁpannarśrutismṛtyartthāgamakuśalarvvēdavēdāntasiddhāntāgama tarkkavādavyākāraṇā
disarvvaśāstraghūrṇnitasabhāśōbhitarvviprajanapūjitarnnityakarmmātithiyabhyāgatadēvatā saṁtarppitargguṇaga
ṇādhārarppāpavidūrarpparamayōgigaḷadhyayana dhyāpanavēdavidyāpāragarssakaḷakaḷāgama kuśalarjñānasaṁReadnā
pūrṇnarāśritajanakalpavṛkṣarssaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararttoṟapakuḷāntatarmmaṟevokkarā vuti gaḷēkavākyardvātriṁśa
sahasralalāṭalōcanargaṁgājaḷadhautanirmmaḷavastrapavitrīkṛtōttamāṁgarappa śrīmaṁna masyadanādiya
vaivaśvatamanuvina Asamandana datti mahāgrāmaṁ baṭṭakeṟeyūroḍeya pramukha mahājanaminnūrvvaru samasta
gōle gōbrāhmaṇarmmodalāgi sabālavṛddharnneradu dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadharmmadiṁ surakṣitamāge rakṣisuttamire © vṛtta .
vanadhiparītabhūtaḷadoḷoppuva beḷvaladēśameṁba kāminiya ghanōnnatastanamanōhara hāramanā bṛhanni
taṁbiniyakaṭītaṭasthitavirājitakāṁciyaneyde pōltucelvane neṟe tāḷdi baṭṭakeṟe neṭṭane kaṇgesedoppitōṟuguṁ .
Intenisida mahāgrahāradoḷ śrīmanmaṇiyara mahadēvanāyakana vaṁśāvatāramente ndaḍe . vṛtta . ©
vārijasaṁbhavānvayadoḷaggaḷamappa vaśiṣṭhagōtranācārasamanvitaṁ sakaḷadharmmavidaṁ nijabandhuvargganistā
rakanendu kēḷ ravikimayyanoldanurāgadindamī dhāriṇi baṇnikuṁ maṇiyareṁba negaḻteya puṇyamūrttiyaṁ .
Intenisidaṁge taneyaṁ kantunibhaṁ nācimayyaneṁbaṁ saśrīmantaṁ nnegeḻdaṁ budhajanacintā maṇi puruṣaratnanurvvīta
ḷadoḷ . patibhaktiyoḷā vibhuvina satiyenisida kaṇnikabbe doreyenipaḷarundhatige sumanege guṇāḷaṁkritesā
vittrige pativṛtāguṇadindaṁ . Ā daṁpatigamabhyudayamadādaṁ pallavise puṭṭidaṁbandhujanā hlādaṁ divyajñāni ma
hādēvaṁ vibudhamitranamaḷinacaritaṁ . vṛtta . śivapādāṁbujabhṛṁganuttamaguṇōttuṁ gaṁ mahādāni dharmmavinō
daṁ sujanāgragaṇyanucitācārānvitaṁ nītiśāstravidaṁ vyāptadigantakīrtti nijagōtrāṁ bhōjacaṇḍāṁśuvendavanīca
kramoṟaldu kūḍe pogaḷguṁ śrīmanmahādēvanaṁ . Ā vibhuvina sati guṇadoḷiḷāvaniteya suteyanumeyana
nasūyeyanā dēvakiyaṁ pōlvaḷenal kēvaḷame muddhikabbe lalanāratnaṁ . Intu negartteyaṁ paḍedā pa
tivratege patiyenisida puṇyabhājanaṁ dharmmacittanāgi . beḷabeḷabeḷage jagatrayadoḷagellaṁ sukṛtara
tnadīpikegaḷanujjaḷipa guṇadiṁ suputraḥ kuḷadīpakanenisidaṁ mahādēvayyaṁ . Intesedaṁge . v® . maṇi
yara mallikārjjunanumāramaṇīramaṇaṁ mahēśvarāgraṇige parōpakārakaraṇavya sanaṁge samasta dharmmabhū
ṣaṇapariraṁjitaṁge sukavivrajakalpakujaṁge bēḷvudaṁ praṇayadinīyutirkke mahimōnnati yiṁ madanāri niccaluṁ .
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 41 neya durmmukhisaṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 3 Ādityavāramutta
rāyaṇasaṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu maṇiyara mahādēvayyanāyakaṁ śrīma nbaṭṭakeṟeyinnūrvvarggaṁ pāda
pūjeyaṁ koṭṭavara kayyoḷage sarvvanamasyamāgi varadānamaṁ paḍedu baṁṭageṟeya mūḍaṇa maiyyoḷ satra
kke caṁdrārkkasthāyiyāge biṭṭa keyi mattaru 20 mattaṁ baṁṭageṟeya baṭṭeyiṁ mūḍaṇadeseyoḷ śrī maṇiya
ramallikārjjunadēvaraṁgabhōgāspadakke biṭṭa karabhūmi mattaru 13 mattaṁ sūladake ṟeya paḍuvadeseyoḷ
dēvaraṁgabhōgakke biṭṭa karabhūmi mattaru 10 Ī dharmmamaṁ śrīmadinnūrvvaruṁ tamma dharmmamāgi pratipāḷisuvaru
Intī dharmmamaṁ rakṣisidavargge śrīprayāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētravargghyatīrtthameṁba puṇyakṣētraṁgaḷoḷ sū
ryyagrahaṇadandu sāsira kavileyaṁ suvarṇnāḷaṁkṛtaṁ māḍi caturvvēdapāragarappa sāsirvvabrāhmaṇargge koṭṭa phala
makku Intī dharmmamanaḷidavaru prayāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētravargghyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷā sāsira kavileyumaṁ catu
rvvēdapāragarappa sāsirvvarbrāhmaṇarumanaḷida mahāpātakanakku © dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ
dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō harēta vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . © paṁcikēśvaradēvara tōṭada hattire baḍagaṇa meyyalu dē
varige mattaru 1 . ©
Digital edition of SII 18.114 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
